title: malva neglecta
intro: Malva neglecta, also known as cheeseweed or wild mallow, is a perennial plant in the mallow family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, making it a popular remedy for skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Malva neglecta can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
